revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 12일]][[wuu:二月十二]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月十二]][[zh:二月十二]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 12|qq=February 12}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 12''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|qid=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|729|en|729|qid=Q23561|lt=729|1=729}} {{ill|March 16|en|March 16|qid=Q2417|lt=March 16|1=March 16}}) – In the incident known as {{ill|Nagayao no Hen|ja|長屋王の変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagayao no Hen|1=Prince Nagaya incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q109357375}}, {{ill|Prince Nagaya|en|Prince Nagaya|qid=Q1963492|lt=Nagayao|1=Prince Nagaya}} was suspected of treason, had his residence besieged, and ultimately committed suicide. * {{ill|Kōnin (era)|en|Kōnin (era)|qid=Q1373070|lt=Kōnin|1=Kōnin (era)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|812|en|812|qid=Q31114|lt=812|1=812}} {{ill|March 28|en|March 28|qid=Q2458|lt=March 28|1=March 28}}) – A cherry blossom ({{ill|Sakura|ja|桜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakura|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サクラ|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サクラ|1=Cherry blossom|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q871991}}) viewing banquet ({{ill|Enkai|ja|宴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkai|1=Enkai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11455343}}) was held as the first official annual event ({{ill|Nenchū Gyōji|ja|年中行事|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nenchū Gyōji|1=Annual event|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11483816}}) in Japan, known as the "Hanaen no 【節】" (detailed in {{ill|812|en|812|qid=Q31114|lt=812|1=812}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1603|en|1603|qid=Q6735|lt=1603|1=1603}} {{ill|March 24|en|March 24|qid=Q2453|lt=March 24|1=March 24}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} assumed the title of {{ill|Shogun|ja|将軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogun|1=jiangjun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q15903946}} and established the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}}. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q7717}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|March 5|en|March 5|qid=Q2392|lt=March 5|1=March 5}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|en|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|qid=Q287657|lt=Tokugawa Yoshinobu|1=Tokugawa Yoshinobu}} demonstrated submission to the imperial forces by leaving {{ill|Edo Castle|en|Edo Castle|qid=Q865913|lt=Edo Castle|1=Edo Castle}} for {{ill|Ueno|en|Ueno|qid=Q576781|lt=Ueno|1=Ueno}} {{ill|Kan'ei-ji|en|Kan'ei-ji|qid=Q3120766|lt=Kan'ei-ji|1=Kan'ei-ji}}, entering a state of reclusion. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|en|1869|qid=Q7720|lt=1869|1=1869}} {{ill|March 24|en|March 24|qid=Q2453|lt=March 24|1=March 24}}) – In Japan, following the transfer of operations to the Osaka Mint, the Tokugawa shogunate’s coin-minting facility, comprising the {{ill|Kinza|en|Kinza|qid=Q3661957|lt=Kinza|1=Kinza}} and {{ill|Ginza|en|Ginza|qid=Q746052|lt=Ginza (history)|1=Ginza}}, was abolished. == Births == * {{ill|Kangi|en|Kangi|qid=Q1194200|lt=Kanki|1=Kangi}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1231|en|1231|qid=Q5417|lt=1231|1=1231}} {{ill|March 17|en|March 17|qid=Q2419|lt=March 17|1=March 17}}) – {{ill|Emperor Shijō|en|Emperor Shijō|qid=Q374020|lt=Shijō Tennō|1=Emperor Shijō}}, the 87th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (died {{ill|1242|en|1242|qid=Q5437|lt=1242|1=1242}}). * {{ill|Shitoku (Japan)|ja|至徳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitoku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|comment=enwiki is a redirect|1=至德|qid=Q1207030}} 3rd year / {{ill|Genchū|en|Genchū|qid=Q1146236|lt=Genchū|1=Genchū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1386|en|1386|qid=Q6355|lt=1386|1=1386}} {{ill|March 12|en|March 12|qid=Q2402|lt=March 12|1=March 12}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshimochi|en|Ashikaga Yoshimochi|qid=Q466287|lt=Ashikaga Yoshimochi|1=Ashikaga Yoshimochi}}, the 4th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|ja|足利幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 室町幕府|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 室町幕府|1=Ashikaga shogunate|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}} (died {{ill|1428|en|1428|qid=Q6315|lt=1428|1=1428}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1823|en|1823|qid=Q6988|lt=1823|1=1823}} {{ill|March 24|en|March 24|qid=Q2453|lt=March 24|1=March 24}}) – {{ill|Shimooka Renjō|en|Shimooka Renjō|qid=Q1324419|lt=Shimooka Renzō|1=Shimooka Renjō}}, a photographer and painter (died {{ill|1914|en|1914|qid=Q2083|lt=1914|1=1914}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1837|en|1837|qid=Q7608|lt=1837|1=1837}} {{ill|March 18|en|March 18|qid=Q2422|lt=March 18|1=March 18}}) – {{ill|Tani Tateki|en|Tani Tateki|qid=Q799829|lt=Tanikane Jō|1=Tani Tateki}}, a military personnel and politician (died {{ill|1911|en|1911|qid=Q2076|lt=1911|1=1911}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|qid=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|729|en|729|qid=Q23561|lt=729|1=729}} {{ill|March 16|en|March 16|qid=Q2417|lt=March 16|1=March 16}}) – {{ill|Prince Nagaya|en|Prince Nagaya|qid=Q1963492|lt=Nagayao|1=Prince Nagaya}}, a member of the imperial family (from {{ill|684|en|684|qid=Q31128|lt=684|1=684}} onward). * {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|qid=Q1324858|lt=Shōryaku|1=Shōryaku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|991|en|991|qid=Q24097|lt=991|1=991}} {{ill|March 1|en|March 1|qid=Q2393|lt=March 1|1=March 1}}) – {{ill|Emperor En'yū|en|Emperor En'yū|qid=Q374104|lt=Enyū Tennō|1=Emperor En'yū}}, the 64th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (from {{ill|959|en|959|qid=Q23750|lt=959|1=959}} onward). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|11|2|13|1|12|3|2|0212|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[cdo:2 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:February 12 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 2월 12일]] [[ja:2月12日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:二月十二]]
[[ar:February 12 (Lunisolar)]]
